caption: A person's hands are shown interacting with a catalog page titled "DESIGNER SERIES PAPER" on a white cutting mat. The page displays several strips of patterned paper and text, including "Visit stampingroom.com and search by item number to see full-sized photos of patterns in color." In the first frame, the person's left index finger points to the bottom left of the paper samples, while the right hand rests on the right edge of the page. As the scene progresses through the subsequent frames, the left hand shifts, with the fingers splaying across the bottom of the patterned paper samples. The person is wearing a ring on the ring finger of each hand. A "Stamping Hub" logo is visible in the lower-left corner of the frames. To the left of the catalog, a metal ruler and a cutting guide are visible on the white mat.
